title: PageTest
content:
Marketing Strategy - The original conversational advice on marketing Storylines to development NGOs, including pain points, positioning, demo strategies, and channels

Investment Proposition - A formal pitch deck-style document for prospective investors, covering market opportunity, business model, financials, and competitive advantages

Conversational Pitch - An accessible, explanatory guide for anyone wanting to understand what Storylines is, how it works, and what value it provides
